description: Schema fragment (menu_user.json). Merged into src/schema.json by src/schema/build.py. Do not load directly -- cross-fragment $ref uses '#/definitions/...' against the bundled output.

menu_user.description: /user -- router user accounts. Either a plain list of user rows, or an object with `_items` plus `group`, `ssh-keys`, and `aaa` sub-menus.

item_user.description: /user -- a router user. Built-in `admin` is addressed via `set [find name=admin]`.

operation.description: `set` updates the user matched by `filter`; `add` creates a new user. Example: `set`.

id.description: Stable IaC identity token rendered into `comment=`. Example: `iac.user.admin`.

id_pad.description: Trailing dot-segments of `id` to retain for ordering. Example: `1`.

comment.description: Free-form comment appended after `id` in the RouterOS comment field. Example: `"primary operator"`.

group.description: RouterOS user group granting permissions. Example: `full`.

password.description: Plaintext password; prefer a `$NAME` reference to a secret. Example: `$ADMIN_PASSWORD`.

address.description: Comma-separated CIDRs allowed to authenticate as this user. Example: `10.0.0.0/24,192.168.88.0/24`.

disabled.description: If true, the user cannot log in. Example: `false`.
